## Description

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest -m "not local"`)
- [ ] I have updated `docs/CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] The wizard isolation rule is respected (no writes to `~/.claude` or `~/.codex`)

## Testing Notes

Describe how the changes were tested, including any edge cases.

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know.
